title: July 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 27''' is the 208th day (209th in leap years) of the year, with 157 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Gary Kurtz]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Roger Guenveur Smith]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Donnie Yen]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Maya Rudolph]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[The Serpent Masters]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 6|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 6]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 110|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 110]] published.
*[[1988]] – [[Chelsea Hamill]] is born.
*[[2006]] – [[Johnny Weissmuller Jr.]] dies.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Didj Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' released.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars Insider 119|''Star Wars Insider'' 119]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 2|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 2]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The High Republic: Out of the Shadows]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Out of the Shadows (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Out of the Shadows'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 22|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 22]] published.
*2022 – [[Obi-Wan 3|''Obi-Wan'' 3]] published.
